mapper.sql: CASE WHEN date(u.CREATED_AT) > date(#{signupBefore}) THEN 'new' WHEN date(u.CREATED_AT) <= date(#{signupBefore}) AND (u.LAST_ACTIVITY IS NULL OR u.LAST_ACTIVITY < #{inactiveSince}) THEN 'inactive' ELSE 'active' END

SELECT u.USER_ID AS userId, u.USERNAME AS username, u.NAME AS name, u.DEPARTMENT AS department, u.TEAM AS team, u.POSITION AS position, u.ROLE AS role, u.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, u.LAST_ACTIVITY AS lastActivityDate, COALESCE(w.RECORD_DAYS, 0) AS weekDays, COALESCE(t.TOTAL_RECORDS, 0) AS totalRecords, AS status FROM ( SELECT USER_ID, USERNAME, NAME, DEPARTMENT, TEAM, POSITION, ROLE, CREATED_AT, ( SELECT MAX(WORK_DATE) FROM WORK WHERE WORK.USER_ID = USERS.USER_ID ) AS LAST_ACTIVITY FROM USERS ) u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT USER_ID, COUNT(*) AS RECORD_DAYS FROM WORK WHERE WORK_DATE BETWEEN #{weekStart} AND #{weekEnd} GROUP BY USER_ID ) w ON w.USER_ID = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT USER_ID, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_RECORDS FROM WORK GROUP BY USER_ID ) t ON t.USER_ID = u.USER_ID
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE date(CREATED_AT) >= date(#{startDate}) AND date(CREATED_AT) <= date(#{endDate})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WORK WHERE DAY_TYPE = 'NOM' AND WORK_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WORK WHERE DAY_TYPE = 'NOM' AND RAW_START IS NOT NULL AND WORK_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS u WHERE date(u.CREATED_AT) <= date(#{signupBefore}) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM WORK w WHERE w.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND w.WORK_DATE >= #{inactiveSince} )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE ROLE = 'ADMIN'
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET NAME = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPARTMENT = #{department, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TEAM = #{team, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POSITION = #{position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROLE = #{role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_AT = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
